selectionDataPolicy.allowed: nested inner rolling validation contained entirely inside each outer train window
selectionDataPolicy.forbidden: outer OOS 2008-2025 metrics, shadow outcomes, future observations and test-label-driven feature design
selectionDataPolicy.outerOosAfterFreeze: optional diagnostic only; cannot select, rank or promote a candidate

innerValidation.aggregation: unique inner-validation dates; earliest eligible fold wins

decisionPolicy: All requirements are conjunctive. A failed requirement produces REJECTED_FOR_SHADOW without parameter changes. Passing produces ELIGIBLE_FOR_SHADOW_REVIEW, never operational approval.
